deterministicInputs: module registry roles and dependsOn rules
repositoryOwnedHeuristics: repository-owned module-shaping guidance captured in recommendation basis entries
recommendationSources.constraintBoundary: explicit constraints and deterministic planning facts MUST remain visible as acceptedConstraints rather than being relabeled as optional guidance

boundaries.planningDependency: recommendation output MUST cite a valid solution-to-manifest planning artifact as its upstream deterministic source
boundaries.optionalGuidance: recommendation output MAY guide module or manifest-shaping decisions but MUST remain optional relative to deterministic planning
boundaries.assemblyRuntimeInput: contributors MUST still produce a standalone app-manifest before repository-owned assembly tooling is invoked

aiToolingGuidance.nextStep: review the recommendation artifact, keep accepted constraints intact, decide which guidance to adopt, and then produce a standalone app-manifest before invoking ./scripts/platform-tool.sh assembly scaffold
